chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.D-03 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on MA 72/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on MA 73/25 4.For orders on MA 74/25 5.For hearing of main case 21-01-2025 Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for the applicant. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-5. Through instant Crl. Revision Application, applicant has questioned the illegality of NBWs issued by the trial Court against him (Annex-A/1 page-21 of Court file). Learned counsel after arguing the case at some length submits that the applicant would be satisfied if this application may be converted into protective pre-arrest bail. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy P.G for the State, present in Court in connection with other cases, waives notice of this application and after going through the file does not oppose the proposal. Accordingly, instant Crl. Revision Application is hereby converted into protective pre-arrest bail application and is hereby granted. Office to assign proper number to Court file. Applicant Khalid Hussain Abro is hereby granted protective pre-arrest bail for a period of ten days in crime No.79 of 2024, registered at P.S, Wasti Jiwan Shah, under sections 302, 324, 427, 148, 149, 109, 337H(ii) PPC & 7 ATA, 1997 subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- 2 (Fifty Thousand) with P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. In the meanwhile, operation of NBWs issued by the trial Court against him shall remain suspended during intervening period. Accordingly, instant Bail Application is disposed of in above terms along with listed application(s).

In the meanwhile, operation of NBWs issued by the trial Court against him shall remain suspended during intervening period. Accordingly, instant Bail Application is disposed of in above terms along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
